commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer judgment on default-package compatibility, automation coverage, supply-chain/security acceptance, and the stacked base branch, not an autonomous repair.; Needs attention: No malicious intent is evident, but the PR changes the dependency and plugin-trust boundary enough that maintainers should explicitly triage the supply-chain and Nix-store trust implications. (sha=5f218197770ff3e1a1d52eb35c2a1521dd8ed420)
commands.review_summary:
This PR switches the stable gateway default from source/pnpm packaging to a shrinkwrap-backed npm package wrapper, with related pin-update, CI, docs, and measurement changes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a packaging/CI PR rather than a bug report with a failing behavior to reproduce. I did not run artifact-producing Nix builds in this read-only review; I inspected the PR body proof and source/diff instead.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer judgment on default-package compatibility, automation coverage, supply-chain/security acceptance, and the stacked base branch, not an autonomous repair.
